metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where the workbook will be deployed
Name of the resource group containing the Log Analytics workspace

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Template Workbook

---

## What is this?
This is a **starter shell** workbook for Microsoft Sentinel. It has two tabs:

- **KQL Queries** - Six query tiles arranged two across per row (3 rows x 2 columns = 6 total). Each tile runs a KQL query and shows results as a table.
- **Visuals** - The same layout but rendered as time series charts with **time brushing**. Click and drag on any chart to zoom into a spike. Every chart updates together.

---

## How to customize this workbook

1. **Set the time range** using the Time Range pill at the top. Default is Last 7 days.
2. **Pick a user** from the Select User dropdown. It is populated from Entra sign-in logs. Leave it blank to see all users.
3. **Replace any example query** by clicking the pencil (edit) icon on a tile. Paste your KQL. Click Done Editing to save.
4. **The `{SelectedUser}` token** inside each query is replaced automatically at run time with the user you selected. If no user is selected the condition is skipped and all users are returned.
5. **Rename a tile** by clicking the pencil icon and changing the Title field at the top of the edit panel.
6. **Add more tiles** by clicking Add query at the bottom of a group while in edit mode.
7. **Change layout width** by clicking the pencil on a tile and adjusting the Custom width percentage (50 = two across, 33 = three across, 100 = full width).
8. **Save the workbook** using the Save button in the top toolbar. Give it a name and pick a resource group.

---

> **Tip for the Visuals tab:** There are two time pills at the top. **Time Range** controls the six charts (they always show the full picture). **Results Window** controls the six result grids below each chart. When you drag to select a spike on any chart, Results Window updates to that narrow window and the grids re-run. To reset the grids back to the full view, click the Results Window pill and pick your original window (e.g. Last 7 days).","style":"info"},"name":"banner-instructions"}]}
